approaches.title: Merge with a copied first array and forward iterators
approaches.summary: Copies the meaningful portion of nums1, then merges the two sorted sequences from front to back using peekable iterators and writes the result into nums1.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial forward merge using a resized clone of nums1 and iterators.

approaches.title: In-place backward two-pointer merge
approaches.summary: Merges from the end of the arrays directly into nums1, avoiding the auxiliary copy and preserving unprocessed nums1 values.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced the copied forward merge with an in-place backward merge using three indices.
